need: They are requesting to be connected to a human representative for assistance.

messages.text: can you connet me to a human
Absolutely! If you send me your email and a quick note about what you need help with, I’ll pass it along to our support team so they can get back to you right away.
Thanks, demo@demo.com! Could you let me know what you’re hoping to learn or achieve with the OnePromise AI Training Course? Just a sentence or two will help our team reach out to you.

Hey there 👋—just wanted to say thanks again for checking out the OnePromise AI Training Course! If you’re still curious about the content, or need a quick chat with a team member, I’m happy to help set that up. Meanwhile, if you want to dive straight into the courses, the Starter tier gives you solid fundamentals in just a few days, and the Professional tier adds real projects and live Q&A. Let me know what works best for you! 🧠✨

Here are the options we have: Starter ($149) for self‑paced fundamentals, Professional ($499) adds advanced modules, projects and live Q&A, and Team ($1299) gives everything in Professional plus up to 10 seats, a private cohort, and an admin dashboard.  

If you’re looking to dive deeper into AI with real projects and mentor support, the **Professional tier** is the best fit. It balances depth and hands‑on experience without going to the full Team level.   Want to pick it, or is there something else you’d like to discuss?

Your order for the Starter tier ($149) has been successfully processed. 🎉 We’re excited to have you on board – if you need any help, just let us know and we’ll connect you to a human representative right away.
